title: nassella holwayi
intro: Nassella holwayi, also known as Holway's fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nassella holwayi include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions such as asthma. Herbal preparations of Nassella holwayi can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
